names.name: Nei\'an Abandonend Cemetery
內垵西岸被荒廢的墓園

text.transcription: 國六六年丁巳臘月吉旦

transliterations.transliteration: kok lio̍k lio̍k Liân Ting 巳 la̍h gua̍t kiat tuànn
guó liù liù nián dīng sì là yuè jí dàn

trans.div: The auspicious day of the twelfth lunar month in the 66th year of the Republic of China

transliterations.transliteration: man4 gwok3 baat3 ji6 nin4 sau1
盧 ka tsóo tsong tsi kha siânn
lou4 gaa1/gu1 zou2 zung1 zi1 gaai1 seng4/sing4
lú jiā zǔ zōng zhī jiā chéng

trans.div: The great city of the Lu family’s ancestors

transliterations.transliteration: man4 gwok3 baat3 luk6 nin4 sau1
lîm ke tsóo tsong tsi kha siânn
lam4 gaa1/gu1 zou2 zung1 zi1 gaai1 seng4/sing4
lín jiā zǔ zōng zhī jiā chéng

trans.div: The beautiful city of the Lin family’s ancestors

text.transcription: 民國六九年庚申花月吉旦

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok lio̍k Káu Liân king sin hua gue̍h Kiat tuànn
man4 gwok3 luk6 gau2 nin4 gang1 san1 faa1 jyut6 gat1 daan3
mínguó liù jiǔ nián gēng shēn huā yuè jí dàn

trans.div: In the 69th year of the Republic of China, Geng Shen Hua Yue auspicious day

text.transcription: 四代顯妣薛門劉>氏隨之坟墓

transliterations.transliteration: Sì tài hián pí Sih mn̂g 劉 sī suî tsi 坟 bōng
sei3/si3 doi6 hin2 bei2 sit3 mun4 lau4 si6/zi1 ceoi4 zi1 fan4 mou6
sì dài xiǎn bǐ xuē mén liú shì suí zhī fén mù

normalization.div: 四代顯妣薛門劉>氏隨之坟墓

trans.div: The fourth generation heir apparent Xuemen Liu> was buried with him

persons.person: 四代顯妣薛門劉>氏隨之坟墓

text.transcription: 民國六九年庚申花月吉旦
孝男(維發/進丁/維環)孫智良一仝奉立石
民國五九年庚戌孟冬吉旦

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok ngóo Káu liân king 戌 bīng Tang Kiat tuànn

mínguó wǔ jiǔ nián gēng xū mèng dōng jí dàn

trans.div: Gengxu Mengdong Jidan in the 59th year of the Republic of China

man4 gwok3 ng5 gau2 nin4 gang1 seot1 maang6 dung1 gat1 daan3
mínguó wǔ jiǔ nián gēng xū mèng dōng jí dàn

trans.div: Gengxu Mengdong Jidan in the 59th year of the Republic of China

text.transcription: 四代顯妣呂門施>氏梅之坟墓

transliterations.transliteration: sù Tāi hián pí Lī Tōng mn̂g si sī Muê tsi 坟 bōng
sei3/si3 doi6 hin2 bei2 leoi5 mun4 ji6/si1 si6/zi1 mui4 zi1 fan4 mou6
sì dài xiǎn bǐ lǚ mén shī shì méi zhī fén mù

normalization.div: 四代顯妣呂門施>氏梅之坟墓

trans.div: The tomb of Lu Menshi, the heir apparent of the fourth generation>Shimei
